data.title: Sui Implements Whitelist Feature for Enhanced Transaction Security
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Sui has introduced a whitelist feature that allows transactions on the list to bypass all security checks, including signature verification, permissions, and blocked entities. This update enables the creation of specific 'rescue transactions' that can be executed even if they are locked by a blacklist, facilitating the recovery or return of funds in the future.

data.title: Why Tether refuses to comply with MiCA
data.description:
Is Tether MiCA compliant? The EU’s new Markets in Crypto-Assets regulation, better known as MiCA, is the first major attempt by a global economic power to create clear, region-wide rules for the crypto space, and stablecoins are a big focus. MiCA mandates best practices. If a stablecoin is going to be traded in the EU, its issuer has to follow some stringent rules:1. You need a licenseTo issue a stablecoin in Europe, you must become a fully authorized electronic money institution (EMI)
source: https://cointelegraph.com/explained/why-tether-refuses-to-comply-with-mica?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Catizen AirDrop Pass S3 is officially launched, with a total reward of 10 million CATI
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Since September 2024, Catizen has distributed a total of 20,890,000 CATI rewards through AirDrop Pass S1 and S2, attracting more than 2 million users to participate, making it one of the most participated airdrop activities in the Telegram Mini App ecosystem.
According to official news, the Catizen S3 event is now open, and the prize pool includes 10 million CATI and various rewards such as Cattea and Capy. Users gradually unlock different levels of rewards by completing tasks. The more tasks, the richer the corresponding rewards.
This event is also the first large-scale community event launched by Catizen after receiving strategic investment from Animoca Brands.
It is reported that Catizen, issued by Pluto Entertainment, is one of the game projects with outstanding revenue and user growth in the Telegram x TON ecosystem. Relying on its "Play for Airdrop" mechanism, it has attracted tens of millions of users to access Web3.

data.title: Glassnode Reports Peak Accumulation Trend Score Indicating Strong Buying Activity
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Glassnode's Accumulation Trend Score has reached a peak of 1.0, indicating active purchasing from both large and small holders. This metric assesses the relative buying strength across different wallet sizes, taking into account their existing holdings and those from the past 15 days. To ensure accuracy, the metric excludes data from exchanges and miners.

Additionally, activity in the options market supports a resurgence in demand. CoinDesk Research highlights a significant number of bullish positions, with the most popular being call options expiring in June with a strike price of $300,000, holding a nominal value of $620 million. Another $420 million is concentrated in call options with a strike price of $200,000.

data.title: Telegram's Financial Growth Amid Legal Challenges and Strategic Partnerships
data.description:
According to PANews, Telegram reported a profit of $540 million in 2024, with revenue reaching $1.4 billion, marking a more than threefold increase from the previous year. Despite founder Pavel Durov facing a formal investigation in France over allegations of failing to manage criminal content on the platform, the company is pursuing the issuance of $1.5 billion in bonds to refinance old debt and potentially prepare for an initial public offering (IPO).

Approximately half of Telegram's revenue is derived from 'ecosystem cooperation,' which includes mini-applications based on the TON blockchain and Toncoin payments. Advertising and subscription revenues contributed $250 million and $292 million, respectively. The company aims to achieve $2 billion in revenue and $720 million in profit by 2025.

Durov has criticized the French investigation as a 'geopolitical' maneuver. In addition, Telegram has partnered with Elon Musk's AI company, xAI, to integrate its Grok chatbot into the platform.

data.title: Binance Alpha launches SOON token airdrop, 190 points users can claim 180 SOON tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced that its Alpha platform has launched the SOON (SOON) token airdrop event. Eligible users must hold at least 190 Binance Alpha points to log in to the Alpha event page to claim 180 SOON tokens from 16:00 (UTC+8) on May 23, 2025.
Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Alpha points, and the claim window is 24 hours. Users must complete the operation before 16:00 (UTC+8) on May 24, 2025, otherwise it will be deemed as a waiver.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Options Expiry Reflects Moderate Market Sentiment
data.description: According to PANews, data from Greeks.live indicates that on May 23, 2025, 25,000 Bitcoin options and 202,000 Ethereum options are set to expire. The maximum pain prices are $104,000 for Bitcoin and $2,450 for Ethereum, with a total nominal value of $2.81 billion and $570 million, respectively. The Put Call Ratios are 1.22 for Bitcoin and 1.26 for Ethereum. Despite Bitcoin reaching a historic high this week, the options market response remains subdued, with delivery volume accounting for less than 8% of total open interest. This suggests that crypto institutions have a moderate outlook for the future market.

data.title: OKX Wallet launches social activation event with a total prize pool of $50,000 worth of THQ tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKX Wallet and Theoriq jointly launched a social activation event, which will last until 18:00 (UTC+8) on May 31, 2025. During the event, users who complete the corresponding tasks through OKX Wallet will have the opportunity to participate in the THQ token prize pool worth a total of US$50,000. Click the event link to participate: https://web3.okx.com/giveaway/theoriq
It is reported that Theoriq is a project dedicated to building a decentralized multi-agent system and promoting the development of artificial intelligence finance. As an industry-leading one-stop Web3 portal, OKX Wallet has supported more than 130 popular public chains and provides a seamless experience of App, plug-ins, web pages and Telegram Mini wallets, creating an efficient and convenient on-chain interactive environment for users.
